issues.title: 4月15日OllamaOptions删除isInternalToolExecutionEnabled方法后报错
issues.body:
在4月15日的SNAPSHOT发布后，发现org.springframework.ai.ollama.api.OllamaOptions删除了isInternalToolExecutionEnabled方法，但它实现的接口org.springframework.ai.model.tool.ToolCallingChatOptions中还存在isInternalToolExecutionEnabled方法，导致运行时报错：

```
java.lang.AbstractMethodError: Receiver class org.springframework.ai.ollama.api.OllamaOptions does not define or inherit an implementation of the resolved method 'abstract java.lang.Boolean isInternalToolExecutionEnabled()' of interface org.springframework.ai.model.tool.ToolCallingChatOptions.
	at org.springframework.ai.model.tool.ToolCallingChatOptions.isInternalToolExecutionEnabled(ToolCallingChatOptions.java:180) ~[spring-ai-core-1.0.0-20250403.094757-1402.jar:1.0.0-SNAPSHOT]
	at org.springframework.ai.model.tool.DefaultToolExecutionEligibilityPredicate.test(DefaultToolExecutionEligibilityPredicate.java:33) ~[spring-ai-model-1.0.0-20250415.100625-46.jar:1.0.0-SNAPSHOT]
```

comments.body:
@HellerZhang Thanks for reporting the issue. How are you using the OllamaOptions here? As long as the prompt options are the instance of ToolCallingChatOptions (via OllamaOptions) the default implementation of the deprecated method is expected to work as in [here](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/blob/main/spring-ai-model/src/main/java/org/springframework/ai/model/tool/ToolCallingChatOptions.java#L80). 

A sample which can help replicate this issue could be helpful.
Irrespective of the above, I have just removed the use of deprecated method in ToolCallingChatOptions [here](15a506985)

我重新查看了我的代码，发现了问题所在，因为我用到了org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.QuestionAnswerAdvisor，所以我手动引入了spring-ai-core，而这个包中正好有一个org.springframework.ai.model.tool.ToolCallingChatOptions，你所修改的spring-ai-model中也有一个org.springframework.ai.model.tool.ToolCallingChatOptions，可能是因为这两个包冲突了。
你有什么建议解决这个问题吗？

You shouldn't be using `spring-ai-core` as spring-ai-core is no longer part of Spring AI since M7 as it has been split into multiple common modules as part of the refactoring. Please read this for more information: https://spring.io/blog/2025/04/04/spring-ai-using-snapshots-part-2
